title: ddty's Farming Tweaks
description: ddty's Farming Tweaks is a farming quality-of-life mod that makes hoes auto-replant crops, adds Fortune support to hoes, bigger tilling areas for diamond and netherite hoes, and 3x3 bone mealing for faster farming!
body:
ddty's Farming Tweaks is a farming quality-of-life mod that makes farming faster and more rewarding!

## Features

- **Auto Replanting** — Hoes automatically replant crops after harvesting. Works with wheat, carrots, potatoes, beetroot and nether wart. Crops that aren't fully grown cannot be broken.

- **Fortune on Hoes** — Fortune enchantment now works on hoes, giving bonus crop drops based on fortune level.

- **Bigger Tilling** — Diamond hoes till a 3x3 area and netherite hoes till a 5x5 area. Other hoes work normally.

- **3x3 Bone Meal** — Using bone meal on crops applies it to a 3x3 area at once. Costs 9 bone meal to keep things balanced.

## Requirements
- Fabric Loader
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) Required
